title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a decentralized memory layer that enables AI agents from different providers to share context across tools. It encrypts memories before storage, allows user ownership of keys, and supports fine-grained access control across multiple AI providers like Claude, Codex, and Pi.
